judge_reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual elements—a hand-drawn map of Fairfield-Suisun AFB with a prominent red line, annotations, and a signature—but Description B provides extensive specific quoted text and details (e.g., dates, object movement descriptions, inset diagrams) that Description A omits, without direct contradiction.
original_image_tags: A detailed, hand-drawn map on beige paper depicting the Fairfield-Suisun Air Force Base layout. A bold red line with cross markers traces a flight path from the upper right, down over the base, and off the bottom edge. Handwritten annotations in blue ink describe the object's movements. A red signature is visible at the bottom.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned military base layout plan map with hand-drawn red trajectory line and handwritten annotations describing an unidentified aerial object’s path, including “OBJECT LOST FROM VIEW AT AN ESTIMATED 20,000 FEET ALT.”; small inset maps/diagrams, a windrose graphic, and multiple “CONFIDENTIAL” stamps are visible.*
